title: cogswellia triternata
intro: Cogswellia triternata is a flowering plant species native to the Himalayan region. It is also known as Himalayan rose clematis or Kashmir rose clematis. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Cogswellia triternata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing; herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications.
